# Card illustrations (drop-in)

Square PNGs, one per card, named by card id. The app falls back to type/emoji
tiles for any file that's missing — drop these in and they appear automatically.

- theme-royals.png · theme-kj-core.png · theme-rewind.png · theme-pastel.png · theme-mela.png
- venue-taj.png · venue-terrace.png · venue-silk-board.png · venue-ikea.png · venue-wework.png
- entry-ghodi.png · entry-tractor.png · entry-g-wagon.png · entry-f1.png · entry-chopper.png
- music-dj-jeetu.png · music-diljit.png · music-sabrina.png · music-zimmer.png · music-coldplay.png
- food-golgappa.png · food-gelato.png · food-draft.png · food-omakase.png · food-matcha.png
- wildcard-paws.png · wildcard-merch.png · wildcard-drop.png · wildcard-typeface.png

(Guest list tiles are numerals only — no images needed.)
